query:
SELECT v2s.id, v2s.stageNumber, v2s.stageName, usp.status 
FROM v2Stages v2s 
LEFT JOIN userStageProgress usp ON v2s.id = usp.stageId 
WHERE v2s.stageNumber BETWEEN 1 AND 3 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3CY2ATatyDNVhxZ.root --database 4LhGieFmaH5SRJ3NvGaeQq --execute SELECT v2s.id, v2s.stageNumber, v2s.stageName, usp.status 
FROM v2Stages v2s 
LEFT JOIN userStageProgress usp ON v2s.id = usp.stageId 
WHERE v2s.stageNumber BETWEEN 1 AND 3 
LIMIT 10;
